name: Suspicious Files Designated as System Files Detected
description: Detection of attrib.exe being used to set the system file attribute (+s) on executable or script files in suspicious directories, indicating an attempt to hide malicious artifacts.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when attrib.exe was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the attrib.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of attrib.exe, including the +s flag and file path.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched attrib.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed attrib.exe.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
